channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-24
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. The `scienceverse/metacheck` project has made notable advancements, merging several pull requests from related projects such as `papers_databases`, `ethics_check`, and `prereg_regcheck`, demonstrating the strong connections between these initiatives. Meanwhile, `Davidvandijcke/coarse` has focused on localization and deployment fixes, and `JamieCummins/regcheck` has added local LLM support and UI fixes to its staging branch. Additionally, `giladfeldman/escicheck` has synced its main branch with the latest versions of `effectcheck`, bringing it up to date with versions `v0.6.4` and `v0.6.5`. These updates highlight the collaborative spirit and ongoing development within our community, and we celebrate the progress being made across these interconnected projects.

83 commits across 5 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: escicheck

Most active:

coarse26 commits
regcheck26 commits
docpluck16 commits
metacheck12 commits
escicheck3 commits

item.title: metacheck: 5 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `dev` branch was the focus of the recent work, with several changes made to it. The addition of `R/import-papers.R` was made to ensure that development installations can be completed cleanly, as stated in the commit message "Add R/import-papers.R so dev installs cleanly". The `dev` branch also saw the merger of several pull requests, including `#317` from `scienceverse/papers_databases`, `#316` from `scienceverse/ethics_check`, and `#309` from `scienceverse/prereg_regcheck`, which were merged as described in the commit messages "Merge pull request #317 from scienceverse/papers_databases", "Merge pull request #316 from scienceverse/ethics_check", and "Merge pull request #309 from scienceverse/prereg_regcheck". Additionally, the `dev` branch received a fix related to the code check for the paper list, merged from `scienceverse/fix/code-check-paperlist` as per the commit message "Merge pull request #318 from scienceverse/fix/code-check-paperlist".

5 commit(s) today:

  • de41849 [dev] Add R/import-papers.R so dev installs cleanly — Lakens
  • ed8c8d3 [dev] Merge pull request #317 from scienceverse/papers_databases — Lisa DeBruine
  • e077134 [dev] Merge pull request #316 from scienceverse/ethics_check — Lisa DeBruine
  • a40d7db [dev] Merge pull request #309 from scienceverse/prereg_regcheck — Lisa DeBruine
  • 1fb2bab [dev] Merge pull request #318 from scienceverse/fix/code-check-paperlist — Lisa DeBruine

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 3 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

Work was done on the 'staging' branch, where a debug of the CLI report was performed. Additionally on the 'staging' branch, further local LLM support was added in the CLI. The 'staging' branch also saw UI fixes, as well as fixes for OSF and multistudy bugs. Furthermore, on the 'staging' branch, security features were hardened.

3 commit(s) today:

  • b0d8ab2 [staging] debug of CLI report — Jamie Cummins
  • 97e8203 [staging] add further local LLM support in CLI — Jamie Cummins
  • df873ec [staging] UI fixes — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →

item.title: escicheck: activity update
item.description:
giladfeldman/escicheck

The `main` branch was the focus of the recent work, with two commits made to it. The first commit synced changes from `escicheckapp@bd6f007`, which corresponds to `effectcheck v0.6.5`, as stated in the commit message. The second commit, also on the `main` branch, synced changes from `escicheckapp@dec37b1`, which is associated with `effectcheck v0.6.4`. These commits brought the `main` branch up to date with versions `v0.6.4` and `v0.6.5` of `effectcheck`. The changes were made by Gilad Feldman, with the commits referenced as `#18` and `#19`.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
